description: As the dust settles in the Lighthouse, Coulson and Elena piece together the data Sibyl accessed. They discover the true purpose of Zephyr One’s trip: the signal was to summon the Chronicom fleet. The horrifying realization dawns—they’re not hiding but launching a massive assault on S.H.I.E.L.D. bases worldwide.

transcript.line: What are you, like, a computer genius now?
Everything from the Hub to the Sandbox to the... Oh, no.
They didn't go to space to hide.
